commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: - [P2] Human review is needed to approve the host bind-mount trust boundary; an automated repair can add tests, but it cannot make the product/security decision.; Needs attention: The diff intentionally adds a CLI-controlled arbitrary host bind-mount path, so maintainer security review is needed even though repo-local YAML loading is avoided. (sha=21d2df96ecd64683de94847af083aafbc71a2333)
commands.review_summary:
The branch adds `LocalContainerConfig.Volumes`, a repeatable `--local-container-volume` flag, and Docker `-v` passthrough for local-container leases while leaving repo-local YAML config unsupported.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a feature PR rather than a bug report. The PR body now provides a concrete terminal run showing the new flag mounting a host path inside a real local-container lease.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Human review is needed to approve the host bind-mount trust boundary; an automated repair can add tests, but it cannot make the product/security decision.

target.title: feat(local-container): add --local-container-volume for host bind mounts
target.body:
## Summary

- Add repeatable `--local-container-volume host:container[:ro]` flag
- Passes through to Docker `-v` in `createContainer()`
- CLI-only — intentionally NOT loaded from repo-local `.crabbox.yaml` (security: untrusted checkouts must not request host mounts)

## Motivation

Testing OpenClaw builds in local containers requires host credentials (`~/.openclaw/` auth profiles, encryption keys). Currently no way to mount these without manual Docker commands outside Crabbox's lifecycle.

## Proof

```
$ crabbox run --provider local-container \
    --local-container-volume ~/.openclaw:/home/crabbox/.openclaw:ro \
    --no-sync -- sh -c 'ls -la /home/crabbox/.openclaw/openclaw.json /home/crabbox/.openclaw/credentials/'

provisioning provider=local-container lease=cbx_792c115e56cb slug=amber-barnacle
running on 127.0.0.1 sh -c '...'
=== Mount contents ===
-rwxrwxrwx 1 root root 13660 Jun  3 15:41 /home/crabbox/.openclaw/openclaw.json

/home/crabbox/.openclaw/credentials/:
drwxrwxrwx 1 root root 4096 Jun  2 23:09 auth-profiles
-rwxrwxrwx 1 root root   66 Jan 23 23:44 discord-allowFrom.json
-rwxrwxrwx 1 root root  334 Apr  4 21:41 telegram-pairing.json
=== PROOF: Host directory mounted successfully ===
command complete in 79ms
```

Tested on Windows (Docker Desktop via WSL2). Docker's `-v` handles path translation natively on all platforms (macOS Docker Desktop/OrbStack, Linux native, Windows Docker Desktop).

## Security

`localContainer.volumes` is **intentionally NOT loaded from `.crabbox.yaml`**. Bind mounts expose host paths and must be an explicit CLI action. A comment in `config.go` documents this decision. This matches the same trust model as `--local-container-docker-socket`.

## Changes

- `internal/cli/config.go`: Add `Volumes []string` to `LocalContainerConfig`; explicit comment blocking YAML config loading
- `internal/providers/localcontainer/flags.go`: Add `volumeListFlag` type (pointer-based for correct flag.Var semantics) and `--local-container-volume` flag
- `internal/providers/localcontainer/backend.go`: Append `-v` flags for each volume in `createContainer()`

Closes #201
target.author: anagnorisis2peripeteia

commands.reason: PR is not opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
